header.title:
Neutral Logistics
Operator
header.description:
From here you can access regional pages and
learn more about our services and global network.

about.title: Connecting The World
about.description: We operate and explore our services worldwide.
about.heading: About us
about.copy1: As a neutral operator (NLO), we offer integrated solutions in ocean, air, and land transportation, along with warehousing and cargo insurance services.
about.copy2: We have our own offices throughout South America, in the Nordic countries (Norway and Sweden) and in the United States. We are part of MSL Group, a business logistics group with presence throughout the Americas, the Caribbean, and parts of Europe and Africa.

network.heading: Our international network
network.description: Operations throughout South America, the United States and the Nordic countries, driving growth and connection between markets.

latam.title: Latin America
latam.services: Multimodal operations, customs clearance, regional distribution.

usa.title: United States
usa.services: Freight forwarding, e-commerce fulfillment, cold chain.

latam.label: Latam
latam.details: We began operations as a neutral ocean consolidator, and subsequently expanded our range of services to become an NLO.

usa.label: USA
usa.details: Born from an alliance between MSL and IFS (Spanish brand) and marked the beginning of our expansion in the US market, with current presence in Los Angeles, Chicago and New York.

nordic.label: Nordic
nordic.details: Founded in 2008, LT Group established itself as a leading company in maritime and logistics services in Northern Europe. In 2025, it was acquired by MSL Group, giving rise to MSL Nordic: the first NLO in Scandinavia, combining regional experience with the group's global network.

footer.icargo_text: We are part of the iCargo alliance
